title: Add ML model serving infrastructure
original_text: Implemented ML model serving infrastructure. Added model REST API with FastAPI. Implemented model batching for throughput. Added model caching for latency reduction. Implemented model A/B testing. Added model canary deployment. Added model monitoring and alerting. Added load balancing for model servers. Result: model serving operational.
expected_body_lines: - Add model REST API with FastAPI
- Add model caching for latency reduction
- Implement model A/B testing and canary deployment
- Add model monitoring and load balancing
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(ml): add model serving infrastructure"
